Fleet is required for super admin user c: Fleet is required for super admin user creation.
Hint User Active: Enable this when the user should be allowed to sign in and use the system.
Hint User Arabic Name: Enter the full Arabic name exactly as it should appear in the system.
Hint User Email: Enter a valid email address for sign-in or notifications.
Hint User English Name: Optional, but recommended for English-facing screens and reports.
Hint User Expiration Date: Optional, and useful when the account should expire on a specific date.
Hint User Password: Use a clear and secure password for the new user.
Hint User Roles: Select one or more roles to define the user access level inside the system.
Hint Username: Use a unique username with English letters, numbers, dashes, or underscores.
